460005.name: Magic Absolver
descriptionLines: A shield that has improved the ability to reflect magic as a shield for the great wizard.
It is very thin because of the characteristic of being an anti-magic shield.
Aumenta all elemental magic o dano by 3%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável de todas as habilidades by 5%.
Aumenta all elemental magic o dano by additional 7%.
Quando equipado with ^990099Mental Condenser^000000 or ^990099Force Condenser^000000:
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade de todas as habilidades by 5%.

460006.name: Complete Encyclopedia
descriptionLines: The complete edition of the encyclopedia of Prontera Mo Publishing, which is famous for its hard edges.
Now, not just the corners, but every side of the book is incredibly heavy and hard.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Diminui After Attack Delay by 5%.
Quando equipado with ^990099Mental Condenser^000000 or ^990099Force Condenser^000000:
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade de todas as habilidades by 5%.

460010.name: Demon Hunting Shield
descriptionLines: A replica of the shield used em the hero who defeated the witch.
Although the shape can be reproduced, it shines brilliantly e cannot have the power to convey that it has prevented all kinds of magic.
Diminui o dano recebido de ^FF0000Normal^000000 e ^FF0000Boss^000000 class monsters em 10%.
Diminui o dano recebido de ^FF0000Normal^000000 e ^FF0000Boss^000000 class monsters em additional 10%.
Se o ^0000FFNível de refinamento^000000 de ^990099Demon Hunting Shield^000000 is ^0000FF+7 ou superior^000000:
Diminui o dano recebido de ^FF0000Normal^000000 e ^FF0000Boss^000000 class monsters em additional 10%.
Se o ^0000FFNível de refinamento^000000 de ^990099Demon Hunting Shield^000000 is ^0000FF+9 ou superior^000000:
Diminui o dano recebido de ^FF0000Normal^000000 e ^FF0000Boss^000000 class monsters em additional 10%.
The effect of ^990099Demon Hunting Shield^000000 will not be activated.^000000
The effect of ^990099Demon Hunting Shield^000000 will not be activated.^000000
Quando combinado com ^990099Ordre Card^000000, ^990099Paiement Card^000000 e ^990099Blut Haase Card^000000:
The effect of ^990099Demon Hunting Shield^000000 will not be activated.^000000

460013.name: Penitentia Aegis
descriptionLines: A shield with regrets that couldn't be kept.
[Grade D]: Increases o dano of ^009900Shield Shooting^000000 by 5%.
[Grade C]: Increases o dano of ^009900Shield Shooting^000000 by 8%.
[Grade B]: Increases o dano of ^009900Shield Shooting^000000 by 15, POW +1, SPL +1
When equipped with ^990099Penitentia Gladius^000000 or ^990099Penitentia Asta^000000:
Increases Attack Speed (Decreases After Attack Delay by 10%).
Decreases o dano recebido from all elemental enemies by 10%.
